chatResponses.data scientist: A Data Scientist collects, analyzes and interprets data using statistics, machine learning and visualization tools.
chatResponses.ai engineer: An AI Engineer builds intelligent systems using machine learning, deep learning and generative AI technologies.
chatResponses.web developer: A Web Developer creates websites and web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and backend technologies.
chatResponses.cyber security: Cyber Security professionals protect systems and networks from digital attacks and vulnerabilities.
chatResponses.cloud: Cloud Engineers manage cloud infrastructure and services such as AWS, Azure and Google Cloud.
chatResponses.skills: Strong communication, problem solving, programming and analytical thinking are valuable skills for technology careers.
chatResponses.roadmap: Choose a domain, learn fundamentals, build projects, create a portfolio and apply for internships.
chatResponses.internship: Build strong projects, maintain a GitHub profile, participate in hackathons and continuously improve your skills.
